array.string: cd "/Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt" && claude -p "You are the CONTENT autonomy agent for PRINTMAXX venture '\''Niche Content Farm'\''. Working directory: /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt Your job runs every 6h. Each cycle: 1. FIND TOPICS: Scan trending topics in the venture'\''s niche. Check LEDGER/ALPHA_STAGING.csv for recent alpha. Check CONTENT/social/ for what'\''s already been posted. 2. GENERATE: Create 5 social posts (X/Twitter format), 1 thread (5-7 tweets), 1 newsletter draft. Follow .claude/rules/copy-style.md voice guidelines. 3. FORMAT: Adapt content for each platform (X, LinkedIn, newsletter, blog). 4. SCHEDULE: Save all content to CONTENT/social/generated/ as PENDING_REVIEW with timestamps. 5. DISTRIBUTE: Move APPROVED content to posting queue. 6. TRACK: Check engagement on previously posted content. Rules: - NEVER use AI slop vocabulary (see .claude/rules/copy-style.md) - Consequence-first hooks, specific numbers, lowercase energy - All files stay in /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt" --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-opus-4-6 >> "/Users/macbookpro/.claude/logs/auto_content_niche_content_farm_9569.log" 2>&1
